_publications._publicationTitle: Cognitive dysfunction in NF1 knock-out mice may result from altered vesicular trafficking of APP/DRD3 complex.

_contextSnippet: DRD3, a member of the G alpha inhibitory G protein coupled receptor family, was also dysregulated in the mutant mice, showing a 3 fold increase in expression in the hippocampus
details: 3 fold increase in DRD3 receptor expression in the hippocampus
